# 'gs branch diff' on an untracked branch fails with a helpful message.

as 'Test <test@example.com>'
at '2024-03-30T14:59:32Z'

# setup
mkdir repo
cd repo
git init
git add init.txt
git commit -m 'Initial commit'
gs repo init

# create an untracked branch via raw git
git checkout -b untracked
cp $WORK/extra/feature.txt feature.txt
git add feature.txt
git commit -m 'Add feature'

# diff should fail with "not tracked" message
! gs branch diff
stderr 'branch not tracked'

-- repo/init.txt --
initial contents

-- extra/feature.txt --
feature contents
